chapter_title.en: The Prayer of Sitting and Glorification, Which is the Prayer of ja'far Ibn Abi Talib

text: 1540 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «إِذَا كُنْتَ مُسْتَعْجِلاً فَصَلِّ صَلاَةَ جَعْفَرٍ مُجَرَّدَةً ثُمَّ اِقْضِ اَلتَّسْبِيحَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1540 - Abu Basir narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"If you are in a hurry, pray the Salat of Ja'far in a simplified form, and then complete the Tasbih (glorification) afterwards."
